Platform Products Solutions Why SYAG Pricing
Request a demo

One cloud platform. Six security pillars. Built for the MEA region.

SYAG is not a guard app or a camera system. It is a complete physical security operations platform that connects every signal in your facility — guards, cameras, IoT sensors, assets, and visitors — into a single operational picture.

Request a demo →

The platform your facility has been waiting for

SYAG is a cloud-native, multi-tenant Physical Security Information Management (PSIM) platform designed specifically for gated communities and mid-market managed facilities in the Middle East and Africa.

Unlike enterprise PSIM systems built for airports and banks, SYAG is self-serve, affordable, and deployable in weeks — not months. Unlike guard management tools, SYAG goes far beyond scheduling and GPS tracking.

01

Guard management

Scheduling, GPS tracking, patrols, register books

02

Camera & VMS integration

Live camera events feeding the incident pipeline

03

IoT device management

Panic buttons, sensors, UPS monitors, and more

04

Asset management

Physical asset registry, lifecycle, and maintenance

05

Visitor management

QR passes, check-in/out, blacklisting, overstay alerts

06

Incident management

Detection, response workflows, resolution tracking, evidence logs

Plus: Flow automation and a live Operations Center.

How it connects

Every signal. One platform.

Camera events

Camera BC → Flow BC → Incident BC

IoT device events

IoT BC → Flow BC → Incident BC

Guard actions

Guard BC → OpsCenter BC

Visitor events

Visitor BC → Incident BC

→ Live Operations Center Dashboard

Your facility. Your data. Always isolated.

SYAG uses a schema-per-tenant architecture. Every facility gets its own isolated data environment within the platform. Your data never touches another tenant's records.

  • Your schema, your data, fully isolated
  • Role-based access: admins, supervisors, guards, ops center operators
  • Each site within your facility can have its own configuration
  • Data export at any time

What this means in practice

  • Your facility admin cannot see another facility's data
  • Even if two facilities are in the same city, their data never intersects
  • You can request a full export of your data at any time

Three interfaces. Built for three ways of working.

Guards

Mobile App

Clock in, scan checkpoints, file incident reports, receive dispatch notifications. Works on entry-level Android devices. Available in Arabic and English.

Supervisors

Mobile + Web

See the live guard map, approve incidents, review patrol logs, and receive escalation alerts. Access from mobile in the field or desktop in the control room.

Facility Admins

Web Dashboard

Configure sites, manage user access, review reports, set automation rules, and view the full Operations Center dashboard.

Live in 30 days. No integrators required.

Enterprise PSIM SYAG
6–18 month deployment 30-day onboarding
Certified system integrators required Self-serve setup
On-premises servers Azure cloud, fully managed
$50K–$1M+ upfront Monthly subscription
Built for airports and banks Built for your facility
